header.title: Budget Planning
header.subtitle: Monitor monthly allocations, spot risk early, and keep {{month}} under control.

empty.title: No budget plan for {{month}} yet
empty.description: Create a monthly plan with a total budget and category allocations so this page can track spending against real limits from your backend snapshots.
empty.hint: Start with your essential categories first. You can keep the total budget tight, then adjust each category allocation as spending changes.

summary.title: Budget Summary
summary.description: Live overview for {{month}} using your API snapshot.
summary.dailyGuidanceWithLimit: This recommendation takes the lower value between the month pace and your profile daily limit, so the target stays realistic.
summary.dailyGuidanceWithoutLimit: Set a profile daily limit in settings if you want a stricter day-to-day spending target alongside this monthly plan.
summary.noTopSpending: No top spending categories yet for this month.
summary.paceHealthy: Your current pace looks healthy for this month.
summary.paceWarning: Spending pace is getting tight. Review large categories before month-end.
summary.paceOver: You are already beyond the planned monthly budget. Reallocate or reduce spending immediately.

categories.title: Category Allocations
categories.description: Adjust live category limits and alert thresholds without leaving the monthly budget screen.
categories.overBudgetHint: This category is already at risk. If you lower the allocation below current spending, it will stay over budget until you rebalance the month.
categories.lockedNoticeTitle: Some expense categories are not tracked this month
categories.lockedNoticeDescription: These categories exist but are not part of this month's budget. Use the Add Category section below to include them.
categories.noCategories: This budget exists, but there are no category allocations to manage yet.

dialog.createDescription: Set the total budget first, then decide which expense categories should be tracked for this month.
dialog.editDescription: Update the overall monthly budget. Category allocations are managed from the list below the summary.
dialog.leaveBlankHint: Edit mode allows updating the total budget amount only.
dialog.visualHint: Keep total allocated within the monthly total so the plan remains realistic.
dialog.allocationOver: Allocated category amounts cannot be greater than the total monthly budget.
dialog.selectCategories: Select expense categories to include in this month and give each one its own allocation and alert threshold. Drag selected categories to reorder them.
dialog.noExpenseCategories: No expense categories are available yet. Create expense categories first, then come back to build this budget.
dialog.categoryThresholdHint: 80 means the warning should start when the category has used 80% of its budget.

feedback.confirmResetText: All snapshot spending values for this month will be reset to zero. Use this only when you intentionally want a fresh start.
feedback.confirmDeleteText: This removes the monthly budget and its category allocations. The operation cannot be undone from the UI.
feedback.confirmRemoveCategoryText: This will remove the category allocation from this monthly budget. You can add it again later.

budgetPulse.title: Budget Pulse ({{month}})
budgetPulse.subtitle: Live budget context while reviewing transactions.
budgetPulse.nobudget: No monthly budget found for this period.

filters.invalidDateRangeMessage: Start date cannot be later than end date.

table.deleteConfirmText: Do you want to delete this transaction? This action cannot be undone.

upcoming.title: Upcoming Payments
upcoming.payConfirmText: Mark "{{name}}" as paid and create transaction?
upcoming.paySuccess: Payment marked as paid and transaction created

addDialog.addDescription: Fill in the details to add a new transaction
addDialog.selectTypeFirst: Please select a transaction type first
addDialog.noCategoriesForType: No categories available for this type
addDialog.receiptFormats: Supports: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, PDF (Max 5MB)

importCsv.title: Import Transactions from CSV
importCsv.description: Upload a CSV file to import multiple transactions at once.
importCsv.dragDrop: or drag and drop your file here
importCsv.templateDescription: Download a sample CSV file to get started

bulkAdd.title: Bulk Add Transactions
bulkAdd.description: Add multiple transactions at once - easier than Excel! Use "Duplicate Last Row" for same category or "Copy from above" for individual rows.
bulkAdd.tip: 💡 Tip: Use "Copy from above" button to quickly copy settings from previous row

recurringDialog.autoPay: Enable Auto Pay (automatically process this payment)

chatbot.title: AI Assistant
chatbot.subtitle: Online now • Ask anything about your finances
chatbot.welcomeMessage: Hi! I'm your AI financial assistant. How can I help you today?
chatbot.errorMessage: I apologize, but I'm having trouble connecting right now. Please try again in a moment.

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.description: Manage your account information and preferences
profile.dailyLimitHint: Get notified when daily spending exceeds this amount
profile.verificationSent: Verification code sent to your email
profile.verifyEmailDescription: Enter the verification code sent to your email
